prompt: Answer with only the option letter. Which metric reports first-token response delay? A. TTFT B. BLEU C. ROUGE D. F1

Answer with only the option letter. Which projection role is the current conservative candidate in this repo? A. V only B. Q only C. K only D. Full QKV
Answer with only the option letter. Which benchmark style checks instruction constraints? A. IFEval B. WikiText2 C. C4 D. PTB
Answer with only the final number. A row has 8192 signed 4-bit weights. Two weights fit in one byte. How many bytes are needed?
Answer with only the final number. A selected-row kernel reads 32 rows, each row has 4096 signed 4-bit weights. How many packed bytes are read?
Answer with only the final number. A matrix has 80 percent 4-bit rows and 20 percent 8-bit rows. What is the average bit width?
Answer with only the final number. A policy keeps 3 of 24 layers dense. How many layers are packed?
Answer with only the final number. A benchmark has 48 prompts and runs baseline plus fused once. How many generations are measured?
Answer with only the final number. A GPU has 8151 MiB total memory. A 90 percent guard allows at most how many MiB if rounded down?
